name: Thai Pasta and Seafood Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Smooth or chunky peanut butter
7 cups Chilled cooked shrimp and scallops
3 medium Kirby pickling cucumbers, halved lengthwise, seeded, and thinly sliced crosswise
2 medium Red bell peppers, cored, seeded, and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Peanut-Ginger Dressing: In a large bowl, whisk together the peanut butter and hot water until smooth.
2. Whisk in the cider vinegar, soy sauce, grated ginger root, and minced garlic.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (shrimp, cucumbers, bell peppers, cilantro, and scallions) to the dressing.
4. Toss everything to mix well.
5. Makes about 12 cups/6 servings.
6. For a spicier version, sprinkle with crushed red pepper.
